#
# ~/.bash_profile
#

[[ -f ~/.bashrc ]] && . ~/.bashrc

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Installa pacchetti. Ri-esegue se i package file cambiano.
# hash: {{ include (joinPath .chezmoi.homeDir ".local/share/chezmoi/dot_config/packages-arch-core.txt") | sha256sum }}{{ include (joinPath .chezmoi.homeDir ".local/share/chezmoi/dot_config/packages-arch-desktop.txt") | sha256sum }}{{ include (joinPath .chezmoi.homeDir ".local/share/chezmoi/dot_config/packages-ubuntu-core.txt") | sha256sum }}
set -euo pipefail

info()    { echo -e "\033[1;34m==>\033[0m $*"; }
success() { echo -e "\033[1;32m✓\033[0m $*"; }
warn()    { echo -e "\033[1;33m!\033[0m $*"; }

IS_DESKTOP={{ .isDesktop }}
DISTRO="{{ .chezmoi.osRelease.id }}"

install_core_arch() {
  info "Arch: installazione core..."
  sudo pacman -Sy --needed --noconfirm git base-devel

  if ! command -v yay &>/dev/null; then
    info "Installazione yay..."
    git clone https://aur.archlinux.org/yay.git /tmp/yay-bootstrap
    (cd /tmp/yay-bootstrap && makepkg -si --noconfirm)
    rm -rf /tmp/yay-bootstrap
  fi

  mapfile -t pkgs < <(grep -v '^\#' "$HOME/.config/packages-arch-core.txt" | grep -v '^$')
  to_install=()
  for pkg in "${pkgs[@]}"; do
    pacman -Qi "$pkg" &>/dev/null || to_install+=("$pkg")
  done
  [[ ${#to_install[@]} -gt 0 ]] && yay -S --needed --noconfirm "${to_install[@]}" || true
}

install_desktop_arch() {
  info "Arch: installazione desktop..."
  if [[ ! -d "$HOME/.local/share/omarchy" ]]; then
    info "Installazione Omarchy..."
    git clone https://github.com/basecamp/omarchy.git "$HOME/.local/share/omarchy"
    bash "$HOME/.local/share/omarchy/boot.sh"
  fi

  mapfile -t pkgs < <(grep -v '^\#' "$HOME/.config/packages-arch-desktop.txt" | grep -v '^$')
  to_install=()
  for pkg in "${pkgs[@]}"; do
    pacman -Qi "$pkg" &>/dev/null || to_install+=("$pkg")
  done
  [[ ${#to_install[@]} -gt 0 ]] && yay -S --needed --noconfirm "${to_install[@]}" || true
}

install_core_fedora() {
  info "Fedora: installazione core..."
  sudo dnf upgrade -y --refresh
  sudo dnf install -y     https://mirrors.rpmfusion.org/free/fedora/rpmfusion-free-release-$(rpm -E %fedora).noarch.rpm     https://mirrors.rpmfusion.org/nonfree/fedora/rpmfusion-nonfree-release-$(rpm -E %fedora).noarch.rpm || true
  sudo dnf copr enable -y pgdev/ghostty || true

  mapfile -t pkgs < <(grep -v '^\#' "$HOME/.config/packages-fedora.txt" | grep -v '^$')
  sudo dnf install -y "${pkgs[@]}" || warn "Alcuni pacchetti Fedora falliti"
  command -v mise &>/dev/null || curl https://mise.run | sh
}

install_core_ubuntu() {
  info "Ubuntu/Debian: installazione core..."
  sudo apt-get update -qq
  sudo apt-get install -y curl wget gpg

  # GitHub CLI
  if ! command -v gh &>/dev/null; then
    curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg       | sudo dd of=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg
    echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main"       | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list
    sudo apt-get update -qq
  fi

  # Mise
  command -v mise &>/dev/null || curl https://mise.run | sh

  # Starship
  command -v starship &>/dev/null || curl -sS https://starship.rs/install.sh | sh -s -- -y

  # Lazygit
  if ! command -v lazygit &>/dev/null; then
    LAZYGIT_VERSION=$(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/jesseduffield/lazygit/releases/latest" | grep '"tag_name"' | cut -d'"' -f4 | sed 's/v//')
    curl -Lo /tmp/lazygit.tar.gz "https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/releases/latest/download/lazygit_${LAZYGIT_VERSION}_Linux_x86_64.tar.gz"
    tar -xf /tmp/lazygit.tar.gz -C /tmp lazygit
    sudo install /tmp/lazygit /usr/local/bin
  fi

  mapfile -t pkgs < <(grep -v '^\#' "$HOME/.config/packages-ubuntu-core.txt" | grep -v '^$')
  sudo apt-get install -y "${pkgs[@]}" || warn "Alcuni pacchetti Ubuntu falliti"
}

case "$DISTRO" in
  arch)
    install_core_arch
    [[ "$IS_DESKTOP" == "true" ]] && install_desktop_arch || info "Server mode: skip desktop packages"
    ;;
  fedora)
    install_core_fedora
    ;;
  ubuntu|debian|pop|linuxmint)
    install_core_ubuntu
    [[ "$IS_DESKTOP" == "true" ]] && {
      mapfile -t pkgs < <(grep -v '^\#' "$HOME/.config/packages-ubuntu-desktop.txt" | grep -v '^$')
      sudo apt-get install -y "${pkgs[@]}" || warn "Alcuni pacchetti desktop falliti"
    }
    ;;
  *)
    warn "Distro '$DISTRO' non supportata esplicitamente. Installa i pacchetti manualmente."
    ;;
esac

success "Packages done [$DISTRO | desktop=$IS_DESKTOP]"
---
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Prompts to generate an SSH key if none exists. Runs once.
set -euo pipefail

if [[ -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" ]]; then
  exit 0
fi

echo ""
echo "No SSH key found. Generate one? [y/N]"
read -r answer </dev/tty
if [[ "${answer,,}" != "y" ]]; then
  exit 0
fi

mkdir -p "$HOME/.ssh"
chmod 700 "$HOME/.ssh"
ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C "{{ .email }}" -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" -N "" </dev/tty

eval "$(ssh-agent -s)"
ssh-add "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519"

echo ""
echo "Public key (add to https://github.com/settings/keys):"
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
cat "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub"
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo ""
echo "Press enter after adding the key to GitHub..."
read -r </dev/tty

# Switch chezmoi remote to SSH (if using HTTPS)
REMOTE=$(git -C "$HOME/.local/share/chezmoi" remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || true)
if [[ "$REMOTE" == https://github.com/* ]]; then
  SLUG="${REMOTE#https://github.com/}"
  git -C "$HOME/.local/share/chezmoi" remote set-url origin "git@github.com:$SLUG"
  echo "Remote switched to SSH: git@github.com:$SLUG"
fi

case "$DISTRO" in

# Prompts to generate an SSH key if none exists. Runs once.
set -euo pipefail

if [[ -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" ]]; then
  exit 0

echo ""
echo "No SSH key found. Generate one? [y/N]"

content.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Autentica GitHub CLI. Gira una volta sola.
set -euo pipefail

info()   { echo -e "\033[1;34m==>\033[0m $*"; }
success(){ echo -e "\033[1;32m✓\033[0m $*"; }
warn()   { echo -e "\033[1;33m!\033[0m $*"; }

if ! command -v gh &>/dev/null; then
  warn "gh non trovato, skip"
  exit 0
fi

# Già autenticato?
if gh auth status &>/dev/null; then
  success "gh già autenticato"
  # Assicura che la chiave SSH sia registrata su GitHub
  PUB_KEY="$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub"
  if [[ -f "$PUB_KEY" ]]; then
    KEY_TITLE="$(hostname)-$(date +%Y%m%d)"
    gh ssh-key add "$PUB_KEY" --title "$KEY_TITLE" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
  exit 0
fi

info "Login GitHub CLI (browser)..."
gh auth login   --hostname github.com   --git-protocol ssh   --web </dev/tty

# Aggiungi chiave SSH a GitHub
PUB_KEY="$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub"
if [[ -f "$PUB_KEY" ]]; then
  gh auth refresh -h github.com -s admin:public_key </dev/tty || true
  KEY_TITLE="$(hostname)-$(date +%Y%m%d)"
  gh ssh-key add "$PUB_KEY" --title "$KEY_TITLE" 2>/dev/null     && info "Chiave SSH aggiunta a GitHub: $KEY_TITLE" || warn "Chiave già presente o errore"
fi

success "gh auth OK"
---
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Clona tutti i repo personali in ~/Codice/
# Gira una volta sola (re-run se questo file cambia)
set -euo pipefail

CODICE="$HOME/Codice"
mkdir -p "$CODICE"

clone_if_missing() {
  local repo="$1"
  local dir="$CODICE/$(basename $repo)"
  if [[ ! -d "$dir/.git" ]]; then
    echo "Cloning $repo..."
    git clone "https://github.com/$repo.git" "$dir"
  else
    echo "Already exists: $(basename $repo)"
  fi
}

# Repos soliwkr
clone_if_missing soliwkr/rank-rent-studio
clone_if_missing soliwkr/eternal-stack-kingdom
clone_if_missing soliwkr/dotfiles
clone_if_missing soliwkr/the-cross-seo

# Repos soliwalker
clone_if_missing soliwalker/verbum-lucis
clone_if_missing soliwalker/verbum-lucis-king
clone_if_missing soliwalker/verbum-lucis-prototype
clone_if_missing soliwalker/eternal-stack
clone_if_missing soliwalker/telegram-ranketogram
clone_if_missing soliwalker/telegram-realestate

echo "Codice pronto in $CODICE"
---
#!/bin/bash
{{ if and (eq .chezmoi.osRelease.id arch) .isDesktop -}}
# NVIDIA DRM modeset — required for Wayland/Hyprland with NVIDIA GPU
# Only runs if nvidia-dkms is installed

if pacman -Q nvidia-dkms &>/dev/null; then
    echo "==> Configuring NVIDIA kernel parameters for Wayland"

    # Add nvidia modules to mkinitcpio
    if ! grep -q 'nvidia nvidia_modeset nvidia_uvm nvidia_drm' /etc/mkinitcpio.conf; then
        sudo sed -i 's/^MODULES=(\(.*\))/MODULES=(\1 nvidia nvidia_modeset nvidia_uvm nvidia_drm)/' /etc/mkinitcpio.conf
        sudo mkinitcpio -P
    fi

    # Add kernel parameter via /etc/modprobe.d
    if [ ! -f /etc/modprobe.d/nvidia.conf ]; then
        echo 'options nvidia_drm modeset=1 fbdev=1' | sudo tee /etc/modprobe.d/nvidia.conf
        echo 'options nvidia NVreg_PreserveVideoMemoryAllocations=1' | sudo tee -a /etc/modprobe.d/nvidia.conf
    fi

    echo "==> NVIDIA kernel params set. Reboot required."
fi
{{ end -}}
---
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Sincronizza Vault e Documenti da OneDrive via rclone (run once)
set -euo pipefail

info()    { echo -e "\033[1;34m==>\033[0m $*"; }
warn()    { echo -e "\033[1;33m!\033[0m $*"; }

if ! command -v rclone &>/dev/null; then
  warn "rclone non trovato, skip sync"
  exit 0
fi

if ! rclone listremotes 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'onedrive:'; then
  warn "Remote OneDrive non configurato. Configura con: rclone config"
  warn "Poi rilancia: chezmoi apply"
  exit 0
fi

info "Sync Vault da OneDrive..."
rclone copy onedrive:/Vault "$HOME/Vault"   --transfers 4 --checkers 8   --update --progress 2>/dev/null || warn "Vault sync parziale, ricontrolla"

info "Sync Documenti da OneDrive..."
rclone copy onedrive:/Home/Documenti "$HOME/Documenti"   --transfers 4 --checkers 8   --update --progress 2>/dev/null || warn "Documenti sync parziale"

info "Sync completato."

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Autentica GitHub CLI. Gira una volta sola.
set -euo pipefail

info()   { echo -e "\033[1;34m==>\033[0m $*"; }
success(){ echo -e "\033[1;32m✓\033[0m $*"; }
warn()   { echo -e "\033[1;33m!\033[0m $*"; }

if ! command -v gh &>/dev/null; then
  warn "gh non trovato, skip"
  exit 0
fi

# Già autenticato?
if gh auth status &>/dev/null; then
  success "gh già autenticato"
  # Assicura che la chiave SSH sia registrata su GitHub
  PUB_KEY="$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub"
  if [[ -f "$PUB_KEY" ]]; then
    KEY_TITLE="$(hostname)-$(date +%Y%m%d)"
    gh ssh-key add "$PUB_KEY" --title "$KEY_TITLE" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
  exit 0
fi

info "Login GitHub CLI (browser)..."
gh auth login   --hostname github.com   --git-protocol ssh   --web </dev/tty

# Aggiungi chiave SSH a GitHub
PUB_KEY="$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub"
if [[ -f "$PUB_KEY" ]]; then
  gh auth refresh -h github.com -s admin:public_key </dev/tty || true
  KEY_TITLE="$(hostname)-$(date +%Y%m%d)"
  gh ssh-key add "$PUB_KEY" --title "$KEY_TITLE" 2>/dev/null     && info "Chiave SSH aggiunta a GitHub: $KEY_TITLE" || warn "Chiave già presente o errore"
fi

success "gh auth OK"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Clona tutti i repo personali in ~/Codice/
# Gira una volta sola (re-run se questo file cambia)
set -euo pipefail

CODICE="$HOME/Codice"
mkdir -p "$CODICE"

clone_if_missing() {
  local repo="$1"
  local dir="$CODICE/$(basename $repo)"
  if [[ ! -d "$dir/.git" ]]; then
    echo "Cloning $repo..."
    git clone "https://github.com/$repo.git" "$dir"
  else
    echo "Already exists: $(basename $repo)"
  fi
}

# Repos soliwkr
clone_if_missing soliwkr/rank-rent-studio
clone_if_missing soliwkr/eternal-stack-kingdom
clone_if_missing soliwkr/dotfiles
clone_if_missing soliwkr/the-cross-seo

# Repos soliwalker
clone_if_missing soliwalker/verbum-lucis
clone_if_missing soliwalker/verbum-lucis-king
clone_if_missing soliwalker/verbum-lucis-prototype
clone_if_missing soliwalker/eternal-stack
clone_if_missing soliwalker/telegram-ranketogram
clone_if_missing soliwalker/telegram-realestate

echo "Codice pronto in $CODICE"
---
#!/bin/bash
{{ if and (eq .chezmoi.osRelease.id arch) .isDesktop -}}
# NVIDIA DRM modeset — required for Wayland/Hyprland with NVIDIA GPU
# Only runs if nvidia-dkms is installed

if pacman -Q nvidia-dkms &>/dev/null; then
    echo "==> Configuring NVIDIA kernel parameters for Wayland"

    # Add nvidia modules to mkinitcpio
    if ! grep -q 'nvidia nvidia_modeset nvidia_uvm nvidia_drm' /etc/mkinitcpio.conf; then
        sudo sed -i 's/^MODULES=(\(.*\))/MODULES=(\1 nvidia nvidia_modeset nvidia_uvm nvidia_drm)/' /etc/mkinitcpio.conf
        sudo mkinitcpio -P
    fi

    # Add kernel parameter via /etc/modprobe.d
    if [ ! -f /etc/modprobe.d/nvidia.conf ]; then
        echo 'options nvidia_drm modeset=1 fbdev=1' | sudo tee /etc/modprobe.d/nvidia.conf
        echo 'options nvidia NVreg_PreserveVideoMemoryAllocations=1' | sudo tee -a /etc/modprobe.d/nvidia.conf
    fi

    echo "==> NVIDIA kernel params set. Reboot required."
fi
{{ end -}}
---
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Sincronizza Vault e Documenti da OneDrive via rclone (run once)
set -euo pipefail

info()    { echo -e "\033[1;34m==>\033[0m $*"; }
warn()    { echo -e "\033[1;33m!\033[0m $*"; }

if ! command -v rclone &>/dev/null; then
  warn "rclone non trovato, skip sync"
  exit 0
fi

if ! rclone listremotes 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'onedrive:'; then
  warn "Remote OneDrive non configurato. Configura con: rclone config"
  warn "Poi rilancia: chezmoi apply"
  exit 0
fi

info "Sync Vault da OneDrive..."
rclone copy onedrive:/Vault "$HOME/Vault"   --transfers 4 --checkers 8   --update --progress 2>/dev/null || warn "Vault sync parziale, ricontrolla"

info "Sync Documenti da OneDrive..."
rclone copy onedrive:/Home/Documenti "$HOME/Documenti"   --transfers 4 --checkers 8   --update --progress 2>/dev/null || warn "Documenti sync parziale"

info "Sync completato."

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# bootstrap.sh — spin up a fresh machine in minutes
#
# Usage (one-liner after SSH key or on a fresh machine):
#   sh -c "$(curl -fsLS get.chezmoi.io)" -- init --apply soliwkr
#
# Or manually:
#   bash <(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/soliwkr/dotfiles/master/.config/bootstrap.sh)

set -euo pipefail
info()    { echo -e "\033[1;34m==>\033[0m $*"; }
success() { echo -e "\033[1;32m✓\033[0m $*"; }

CHEZMOI_REPO="https://github.com/soliwkr/dotfiles"

# Detect distro
if [[ -f /etc/os-release ]]; then
  source /etc/os-release
  DISTRO="${ID:-unknown}"
else
  DISTRO="unknown"
fi

info "Detected distro: $DISTRO"

# Install chezmoi if missing
if ! command -v chezmoi &>/dev/null; then
  info "Installing chezmoi..."
  sh -c "$(curl -fsLS get.chezmoi.io)" -- -b "$HOME/.local/bin"
  export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
fi

# Apply dotfiles (chezmoi handles package install via run_once scripts)
info "Applying dotfiles from $CHEZMOI_REPO..."
chezmoi init --apply "$CHEZMOI_REPO"

success "Done! Log out and back in (or reboot) to load the desktop environment."

content.text:
Trovato. Ci sono **3 problemi distinti**:

---

## Problema 1 (causa principale dell'errore): Age key mancante

`dot_config/rclone/encrypted_private_rclone.conf.age` usa crittografia age, ma il file `~/.config/chezmoi/key.txt` non esiste su questa macchina.

Quando esegui `chezmoi init --apply`, chezmoi prova a decrittare `rclone.conf` e fallisce subito:
```
chezmoi: .config/rclone/rclone.conf: open /home/soliwkr/.config/chezmoi/key.txt: no such file or directory
```

**Fix**: Il `bootstrap.sh` deve gestire il trasferimento della chiave age *prima* di `chezmoi init --apply`. La chiave age è legata a un singolo recipient — non ne puoi generare una nuova, devi portare quella originale sulla nuova macchina.

Modifica `bootstrap.sh` per chiedere la chiave age prima di procedere:

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# bootstrap.sh — spin up a fresh machine in minutes
#
# Usage (one-liner after SSH key or on a fresh machine):
#   sh -c "$(curl -fsLS get.chezmoi.io)" -- init --apply soliwkr
#
# Or manually:
#   bash <(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/soliwkr/dotfiles/master/.config/bootstrap.sh)

set -euo pipefail
info()    { echo -e "\033[1;34m==>\033[0m $*"; }
success() { echo -e "\033[1;32m✓\033[0m $*"; }

CHEZMOI_REPO="https://github.com/soliwkr/dotfiles"

# Detect distro
if [[ -f /etc/os-release ]]; then
  source /etc/os-release
  DISTRO="${ID:-unknown}"
else
  DISTRO="unknown"
fi

info "Detected distro: $DISTRO"

# Install chezmoi if missing
if ! command -v chezmoi &>/dev/null; then
  info "Installing chezmoi..."
  sh -c "$(curl -fsLS get.chezmoi.io)" -- -b "$HOME/.local/bin"
  export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
fi

# Apply dotfiles (chezmoi handles package install via run_once scripts)
info "Applying dotfiles from $CHEZMOI_REPO..."
chezmoi init --apply "$CHEZMOI_REPO"

success "Done! Log out and back in (or reboot) to load the desktop environment."

# Apply dotfiles (chezmoi handles package install via run_once scripts)
info "Applying dotfiles from $CHEZMOI_REPO..."
chezmoi init --apply "$CHEZMOI_REPO"
input.new_string:
# Ensure age key is present (required to decrypt rclone.conf and other secrets)
AGE_KEY="$HOME/.config/chezmoi/key.txt"
if [[ ! -f "$AGE_KEY" ]]; then
  info "Age key not found at $AGE_KEY"
  echo ""
  echo "This dotfiles repo uses age encryption for secrets (rclone.conf, etc.)."
  echo "You must copy your age private key to this machine before continuing."
  echo ""
  echo "From your existing machine, run:"
  echo "  scp ~/.config/chezmoi/key.txt $(whoami)@$(hostname):~/.config/chezmoi/key.txt"
  echo ""
  echo "Or paste the key content now (end with Ctrl-D on a blank line):"
  mkdir -p "$(dirname "$AGE_KEY")"
  cat > "$AGE_KEY"
  chmod 600 "$AGE_KEY"
  success "Age key saved."
fi

# Apply dotfiles (chezmoi handles package install via run_once scripts)
info "Applying dotfiles from $CHEZMOI_REPO..."
chezmoi init --apply "$CHEZMOI_REPO"

content.text:
---

## Problema 2: `.bash_profile` out of sync

Il file `~/.bash_profile` ha 2 righe extra rispetto al sorgente chezmoi (aggiunte probabilmente da mise o un altro installer):

```
. "$HOME/.local/share/../bin/env"
```

Quando chezmoi applica e vede la differenza, apre un prompt interattivo via `/dev/tty`. Questo causa l'errore che vedi se esegui chezmoi senza un terminale reale.

**Fix**: aggiorna il sorgente per includere quella riga:

content.content: The file /home/soliwkr/.local/share/chezmoi/dot_bash_profile has been updated successfully.
(Bash completed with no output)

content.text:
Nessuna differenza. Ora i file coincidono.

---

## Problema 3 (sicurezza): chiave SSH privata in chiaro nel repo

`private_dot_ssh/private_id_ed25519` è una chiave SSH privata salvata **in chiaro** nel repo chezmoi. Il prefisso `private_` imposta solo i permessi `0600`, **non cifra il file**. Se `soliwkr/dotfiles` è un repo pubblico, la chiave è esposta.

Dovresti o:
- Rimuovere la chiave dal repo (`chezmoi forget ~/.ssh/id_ed25519`) e gestirla separatamente, oppure
- Cifrarla con age: rinomina il file in `encrypted_private_id_ed25519.age` e cifrala con `chezmoi encrypt ~/.ssh/id_ed25519`

---

## Riepilogo

| # | Problema | Stato |
|---|----------|-------|
| 1 | `key.txt` age mancante → errore su `rclone.conf` | Fixato in `bootstrap.sh` |
| 2 | `.bash_profile` divergente → errore TTY | Fixato nel sorgente |
| 3 | SSH private key in chiaro nel repo | Da valutare |

lastPrompt: analizza il mio setup chezmoi. da errore quando lo importo.
